channel.title: Runtime on FsFlow
channel.description: Recent content in Runtime on FsFlow

item.title: AsyncFlow.Runtime.cancellationToken
item.description:
Reads the current cancellation token from the flow.

let cancellationToken<'env, 'error> : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, CancellationToken>

Remarks

This observes the runtime token; it does not translate cancellation into a typed error by itself.

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.Runtime.catchCancellation
item.description:
Catches OperationCanceledException and converts it into a typed error.

let catchCancellation (handler: OperationCanceledException -> 'error) (flow: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Remarks

This translates cancellation exceptions raised during execution. It does not pre-check the token.

Parameters

  • handler: The function to convert the exception.
  • flow: The source flow.

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.Runtime.ensureNotCanceled
item.description:
Checks if cancellation has been requested and returns a typed error if it has.

let ensureNotCanceled<'env, 'error> (canceledError: 'error) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, unit>

Remarks

This observes the current token state and returns a typed error immediately instead of waiting for an exception.

Parameters

  • canceledError: The error to return if canceled.

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.Runtime.log
item.description:
Writes a log entry using the writer provided by the environment.

let log (writer: 'env -> LogEntry -> unit) (level: LogLevel) (message: string) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, unit>

Parameters

  • writer: The logging function extracted from the environment.
  • level: The log level.
  • message: The message.

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: LogEntry
item.description:
A structured log entry written through a runtime logger.

type LogEntry

Information

  • Module: Global
  • Source: source

item.title: LogLevel
item.description:
Log levels used by runtime logging helpers and environment-provided logging functions.

type LogLevel

Constructors

  • Trace source
  • Debug source
  • Information source
  • Warning source
  • Error source
  • Critical source

Information

  • Module: Global
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.Runtime.logWith
item.description:
Writes a log entry using a message produced from the environment.

let logWith (writer: 'env -> LogEntry -> unit) (level: LogLevel) (messageFactory: 'env -> string) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, unit>

Parameters

  • writer: The logging function extracted from the environment.
  • level: The log level.
  • messageFactory: The function to produce the message from the environment.

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: RetryPolicy.noDelay
item.description:
let noDelay (maxAttempts: int) : RetryPolicy<'error>

Information

  • Module: RetryPolicy
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.Runtime.retry
item.description:
Retries a flow according to the specified policy.

let retry (policy: RetryPolicy<'error>) (flow: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Parameters

  • policy: The retry policy.
  • flow: The flow to retry.

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: RetryPolicy
item.description:
Defines how runtime retry helpers repeat typed failures in a controlled way.

type RetryPolicy<'error>

Information

  • Module: Global
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.Runtime.sleep
item.description:
Suspends the flow for the specified duration, observing cancellation.

let sleep<'env, 'error> (delay: TimeSpan) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, unit>

Remarks

If the runtime token is canceled, the underlying task raises cancellation which can be translated with catchCancellation.

Parameters

  • delay: The duration to sleep.

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.Runtime.timeout
item.description:
Wraps a flow with a timeout. If the flow does not complete within the specified duration, returns a typed error.

let timeout (after: TimeSpan) (timeoutError: 'error) (flow: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Remarks

This helper translates timeout into a typed error. It does not automatically cancel the underlying work on timeout.

Parameters

  • after: The duration after which to timeout.
  • timeoutError: The error to return on timeout.
  • flow: The flow to wrap.

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.Runtime.timeoutToError
item.description:
Transitions to a failure value on timeout.

let timeoutToError (after: TimeSpan) (error: 'error) (flow: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.Runtime.timeoutToOk
item.description:
Wraps a flow with a timeout. If the flow does not complete within the specified duration, returns a success value.

let timeoutToOk (after: TimeSpan) (value: 'value) (flow: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.Runtime.timeoutWith
item.description:
Transitions to a fallback workflow on timeout.

let timeoutWith (after: TimeSpan) (fallback: unit -> AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) (flow: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source

item.title: AsyncFlow.Runtime.useWithAcquireRelease
item.description:
Safely acquires a resource, uses it, and ensures it is released via a task-based action.

let useWithAcquireRelease (acquire: AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'resource>) (release: 'resource -> CancellationToken -> Task) (useResource: 'resource -> AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>) : AsyncFlow<'env, 'error, 'value>

Parameters

  • acquire: The flow that acquires the resource.
  • release: The function that releases the resource.
  • useResource: The flow that uses the resource.

Information

  • Module: AsyncFlow.Runtime
  • Source: source
